audit_items.proof_trace: When s_allowlistedAssets is empty, s_allowlistedAssets.values() returns an empty array; the for-loop at L228 executes 0 times leaving eligibleAssetsIdx and endedAuctionsIdx both at 0. The final guard at L288 (eligibleAssetsIdx > 0 || endedAuctionsIdx > 0) evaluates false, so upkeepNeeded remains its zero-initialized value of false.
